ShortDescription.Value: Auto-Clean garbage OR use Trash Boss = Self manage garbage trucks + buildings

Publish.LongDescription:
**Magic Garbage + Trash Boss**
Handle garbage your way:
---
### OPTION 1 AUTO CLEAN - ✅ Total Magic On, removes all garbage. - Garbage icons clear because there is no garbage. - Trucks and facilities become mostly cosmetic. - Mod does not stop Garbage system, it's just very fast cleanup.
### OPTION 2 SELF MANAGE - ✅ Trash Boss On; manage how you like. - **Sliders** to control garbage trucks + facilities - 🚚 Enhance trucks to reduce traffic and service strain. - Great if you still want to see trucks driving around with fewer problems.
- **Helper buttons** - [Game Defaults] = reset all sliders to 100% (pure vanilla). - [Recommended] = suggested preset values for easy management.
### NEW STATUS Report - Useful garbage statistics; helps any Trash Boss or to figure out what is happening. - Lean: runs in Options menu, does not run in-city per frame.
#### OPTION 3 NO MAGIC (vanilla) - Turn Trash Boss on ✅, Click [Game Defaults] - All sliders at 100% = standard gameplay.
#### Support and feedback - If the mod helps you, give it a Like, it's free + easy :) - Feedback on: Github, Discord, etc., links on this page.
---
### Compatibility - Works with new and existing cities. Enable/Disable any time, safe to remove any time. - Does not use Harmony or Reflection; lightweight, compatible.
---
### Credits - RiverMochi - author - Thanks to Wayz for inspiration on the original Magical Garbage mod - yenyang - code review, tech advice - Necko1996 - testing and screenshots - gagaxm - truck image
#### 11 languages - English, Français French, Deutsch German, Español Spanish, Italiano Italian - 日本語 Japanese, 한국어 Korean, Português Brasil, Polski Polish - 简体中文 Simplified Chinese, 繁體中文 Traditional Chinese
Publish.ChangeLog: * Trash Boss is the new self-manage feature. * added new Status report to Options menu. * added detailed garbage report to log. * added facility truck + Worker summary in Status/log. * updated translations, fix typos.
